string.text: Hej, tam! A nu, zharnuli vietrazi i prybrali viosły.[if:convo_mocking_revenge]
Hej! Zdajecca, tvajo vartaje žalu karyta zanadta pavolnaje, davaj pabałbočam. Moža, chočaš nazvacca?

Ja {?SPEAKER.GENDER}Kujazkaja maračka{?}Kujazki marak{\?}. Maja kampanija płavaje dalej ad svajoj radzimy, čym chtości inšy na ŭźbiarežžy, i ja {?SPEAKER.GENDER}pierakanana{?}pierakanany{\?}, što maje viedy płyniaŭ, viatroŭ i zorak nie sastupajuć viedam luboha majho paplečnika.
Na majoj radzimie baćkoŭ treba šanavać i słuchacca.
Nivodny narod nia zmoh by kvitnieć na mory biaz drobnaha piractva.
Praŭda? Zdajecca, siońnia mnie daviadziecca zapeckać ruki.[ib:aggressive][if:convo_bared_teeth]

Ja rodam sa Svalfjorda, najaddalenaha kutka Nordłanda. My vychodzim na kitoŭ u małych łodkach, daviarajem svaje žyćci adzin adnamu. Kali patrebna karabielnaja kamanda, vy nia znojdziecie nikoha lepšaha za nas.
Chto kapitan hetaha karabla? Chaču viedać, kaho zabju.
Hej! Chto ty {?PLAYER.GENDER}takaja{?}taki{\?}? Havary, pakul nia {?SPEAKER.GENDER}kinuła{?}kinuŭ{\?} ciabie na dno.
Zdarova! Zdajecca, my vorahi, i praz chvilinu ja zahadaju svajmu karablu pajści na abardaž. Ale spačatku chaču viedać tvajo imia.
Ja pamiataju, apošni raz jak my bilisia razam. U nas byli dobryja karabli i advažnyja kamandy. Škada, što nie zmahli zdabyć pieramohu.
Prybiarycie vietrazi i viosły, albo my napadziom.[ib:warrior][if:convo_angry]
Ej! Chočaš štości skazać, pierš čym my pačniom ataku?
Chmm. Biaz rodnych my - jak žyvioły.

Moj baćka byŭ kavalom, i ja pieraniaŭ jaho ramiastvo. Viedaju, što takija navyki ciapier na vahu zołata. Achvotna budu tačyć klinki i łatać daśpiechi za płatu, ale ad spadara prašu adnaho - šancu vybicca ŭ ludzi.

Daŭhi mianie tady prycisnuli jak śled. Daviałosia pradać statak i chatu, kab raźličycca, i voś ja tut - šukaju novy zarobak. Budu sumavać pa Bejnlandzie: pustelnyja bałoty, cichija lasy… Ja čałaviek darohi - kali patrebien vyviednik - dyk heta pra mianie.
Hej, na borcie! U hetych vodach karabli płaciać padatak, albo hrašyma, albo kryvioj.[if:convo_mocking_revenge]
Ja z Čarasa. Nia viedaju, kolki ty {?PLAYER.GENDER}čuła{?}čuŭ{\?} pra jaho niadaŭniaje minułaje.

Voś tam ja i vyras - na kavałku skały, ablapanym čajkami, žyŭ rybaj, vodaraściami dy daždžavoj vadoj, bo, viadoma ž, baronski danośnik prybraŭ da ruk našu ziamlu. Zatoje skažu biez chvalby: mora ja viedaju jak nichto - viecier moža nalacieć adkul zaŭhodna i kali zaŭhodna, i rybak, jaki nia zmoža praśliznuć miž dźviuma skałami na adlehłaści kidka kamienia pry mocnym bakavym vietry, stanie zdabyčaj akułaŭ.
karaleva Nordviha
{STR_SALUTATION}… Dyk heta ty? Padobna, ad losu tabie nie ŭciačy, ha? Pabačym, ci prymie mora tvaju hniusnuju tušu, albo vyplunie nazad.
Chočaš historyju, ha? Raskažu koratka. Doŭhaj - nu, na paŭzimy chopić. Bejnlandy… kali dachodzić da zakonaŭ, jany nia lubiać ni prosta, ni tanna.
Ja - {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} z rodu {CLAN_NAME}. Chvalicca nia budu, chaj inšyja raspaviaduć pra našyja vyčyny. To havorka na doŭhuju zimovuju noč - času zojmie šmat.
Dobra. Tolki budź {?PLAYER.GENDER}pilnaj{?}pilnym{\?} - śviet poŭny złodziejaŭ, i nie ŭsie takija dobryja, jak my.[ib:closed][rf:convo_bemused]
Ahoj! Kali čuješ moj hołas - ni kroku bližej. Čyj heta karabiel?
{STR_SALUTATION}… Vitaju! Niachaj nadvorje budzie dobrym, a mora łaskavym.
Zdarova! Ja viedaju tvoj karabiel. {STR_SALUTATION}, ci nie? Nam jość pra što pahavaryć?
Tolki {?PLAYER.GENDER}niahodnica{?}niahodnik{\?} budzie chvalicca takoj podłaściu.
Aha, možna i adkupicca. Ale nia raju nadta handlavacca - umovy dyktuje pradaviec.[ib:hip][rf:convo_bemused]
Hej, tam! Chto hałoŭny? Viedajcie - my albo zachopim vas, albo puścim na dno.
Mir tabie, {?PLAYER.GENDER}nieznajomka{?}nieznajomiec{\?}, i spakojnaha mora. Ja nie paznaju tvajho karabla. Z kim maju honar havaryć?
{STR_SALUTATION}! Tolki ŭbačyŭ abrosły rakavińniem korpus, zabłytanyja kanaty i zachłamlenuju pałubu - i adrazu paznaŭ ciabie!

Vioska adpraviła mianie słužyć jarłu Hrykki Paŭvuchamu ŭ jakaści firdmana. Ja hareŭ žadańniem bicca i zdabyvać słavu dy bahaćcie, ale trochi razumieŭ u kavalstvie - a jamu jakraz patrebien byŭ kaval. Zamiest družyny mianie pasadzili ŭ čorny kut la ściany i zahadali dźmuć miachi dy klapać ćviki i padkovy.
Ja doŭha {?PLAYER.GENDER}čakała{?}čakaŭ{\?} hetaha dnia. Hlań jak śled navokał, bo chutka tabie daviadziecca hladzieć chiba što na nutro akułavaha žyvata.
Hej, na pałubie! Paznaju ciabie. Budź {?SPEAKER.GENDER}aściarožna{?}aściarožny{\?} — moža stacca, što {?SPEAKER.GENDER}ŭchapiła{?}ŭchapiŭ{\?} rybu bolšuju, čym {?SPEAKER.GENDER}dumała{?}dumaŭ{\?}.

Mo kaliści raspaviadu svaju historyju dziasiatku synoŭ, za stałom u svajoj zale na śviata soncastajańnia, kab jany pajšli maim šlacham i vyjšli ŭ mora šukać dolu. A pakul budu małoć bajki nieznajomcam u korčmach.

Ale Baronu dej Kortajnu, što vioŭ abłohaj, nie było spravy da apraŭdańniaŭ. Jon jeździŭ uzdoŭž uźbiarežža i viešaŭ kožnaha chto mieŭ łodku ŭ piaci ljach ad Čarasa, kali toj nia moh usio rastłumačyć. Niechta danios na majho baćku - i nam daviałosia ŭciakać na vyspy zaliva, jak i astatnim.
Hej! Vitaju! Chto kapitan hetaha karabla?
Byvajuć ludzi, što iduć za svaim hłupstvam až da mahiły - i nia spyniš ich.
Hej, tam! Ź {?PLAYER.GENDER}jakoj advažnaj marapłaŭkaj{?}jakim advažnym marapłaŭcam{\?} maju honar havaryć?

Jak tolki ja staŭ darosłym, ja ŭziaŭ sto aviečak sa statku, pradaŭ ich i nabyŭ nievialikuju snekku. Najniaŭ ludziej i pajšoŭ rabavać Sturhijskaje uźbiarežža. Ale pamyliŭsia ŭ ludziach - jak bajarskaja družyna ŭdaryła, usie raźbiehlisia, a karabiel spalili.

Nordy — narod, narodžany moram. Navat nazva ich kraju, Nordvih, aznačaje ledzianoje ŭźbiarežža, vyrezanaje ledavikami, što złučaje raskidanyja sieliščy. Jašče niadaŭna ich harady byli ŭsiaho tolki aharodžanymi śviatyniami ci kirmašami la fijordaŭ. Chto zadavalniajecca małym — trymaje aviečak i sieja jačmień, a chto prahnie bolej — vychodzić u mora na doŭhich karablach.
{STR_SALUTATION}… Mory prynieśli ciabie ŭ našyja ruki.

Vańni dumali, što inšyja Nordy ŭciakuć. Ale jany nia viedali ich. Adzin moj brat pryjšoŭ da mianie tajemna i paraiŭ atrucić siamju majho Vańnijskaha muža, jak taja staraja Sturhijskaja karaleva. Cha! Učora mnie skazali vyjści za jaho i naradzić dziaciej, a siońnia — zabić? Nie, dziakuj. Ja ŭciakła ŭnačy i bolej nie chaču bačyć ni bratoŭ, ni muža.
Zdarova! Maješ što skazać — kažy. Ale tolki pasprabuj schitravać — i adrazu pojdzieš na dno.
Jak by tam ni było, hod z Vańni navučyŭ mianie šmat čamu: pra lasy, ziołki, lačeńnie ranaŭ i źbivańnie žaru. Dumaju, ja była by karysna vajarskaj kampanii.
Dobra, niachaj nichto nia skaža, što my nia dali tabie šancu.[ib:aggressive][if:convo_annoyed]
Što zdaryłasia z Čaraskimi rybakami? Niaŭžo ryba skončyłasia? Čamu jany vymušany zarablać na kantrabandzie i paŭstańni?

Nastupnym razam ja płavaŭ na fiełucy z Zieoniki na ŭschod, u Danuściku. Piraty zachapili nas i spalili karabiel da ščentu. Potym ja słužyŭ na dromanie, prystasavaŭsia da pryvatyrskaha žyćcia, ale na nas nalacieła niečakanaja pyłavaja bura z Džabal Tamaru i raźbiła nas ab skału ŭ Čaraskaj zatocy. Štoraz dola škadavała mianie, spačatku davodziačy da halečy.
Ja šukaju pracu. Raskažu svaju historyju, kab ty nie {?PLAYER.GENDER}sumniavałasia{?}sumniavaŭsia{\?} ŭ maich navykach.
Hej! Maju honar daviedacca, chto kapitan hetaha karabla?
Vy! Na jakar vybladki albo pierarežu ŭsim hłotki![if:convo_bared_teeth]
Ahoj! Što za karabiel, chto tut kapitan?
Hej! Dyk chto kapitan hetaj pasudziny, što jak śvińnia ŭ chvalach valajecca?

Voś što: ja pryjšoŭ u Bejnland niekalki hadoŭ tamu, jak i mnohija z Nordvihu. Kazali — ziamla volnaja, i ŭsie pierad zakonam roŭnyja. Znajšoŭ ja dalinu z ručajom i tłustaj travoj, pastaviŭ tam chatu. Tolki treba było spytać, čamu da mianie nichto hetaha nie rabiŭ.
Ja — {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}. Nie stanu chvalicca rodam. Sapraŭdny syn Poŭnačy imkniecca pieraŭzyści baćkoŭ, a nia žyć ich słavaj.

Ale Nordaŭ prychodziła ŭsio bolej. Ja žyła ŭ vioscy muža, i Vańni narakali, što praz heta psujecca palavańnie. Jany paličyli, što damova ŭžo skasavana. Pieramovy ničoha nie dali. Urešcie Vańni zabili niekalki Nordaŭ u palach — praŭda, maich bratoŭ nie kranuli, z pavahi da mianie.

Uźnikła svarka z-za tušy kita. Dakładna nie pamiataju, z čaho pačałosia, ale baćka ličyŭ, što jana tolki jahonaja. Jon praklaŭ inšych i skazaŭ słovy, jakich užo nie viarnuć. Prasić prabačeńnia nia staŭ i musiŭ pakinuć viosku. I zastalisia my ŭtroch — ja, jon i dziadźka — žyć na bierazie ŭ ziamlancy z adtulinaj u dachu dla dymu.
Ja rodam z Jumne. Chacia ja Nordka pa naradžeńni, žyła siarod Vańni i navučyłasia ichnim viedam — pra ziołki i lekavańnie.
Hej! {STR_SALUTATION}… Tvoj karabiel nia zbłytaješ ni z čym! Zirni na jaho — prosta cud, što jon jašče nie patanuŭ ad soramu.

Ja paklaŭsia: nie viartacca dadomu, pakul nia budu kamandavać karablom, vartym zajzdraści majho brata. Ja vajavaŭ za Vłandyjskich baronaŭ, Impierskich archontaŭ, navat za ŭschodniaha nojana. Vajavaŭ usiudy — i na ziamli, i na vadzie. Ale ŭsie jany skupyja, i nichto nie addziačyŭ mnie pa zasłuhach.
Dobra my tady tych pirataŭ pabili. Jak ni kažy, ahulny vorah usiaho ludu.
Jak ni kruci, kali tabie patrebny styrnavy — lepšaha za mianie nia znojdzieš.
Dyk voś… Kali šukaješ ludziej — vajaroŭ abo kapitanaŭ — ja hatovy. Budzieš dobra płacić, dyk i słužyć budu vierna.
Ahoj! Chaču pahavaryć z vašym kapitanam.
Ja naradziłasia na chutary pad Trondełaham, ale siamja pierabrałasia na novyja ziemli la raki Jumne. I kali bolej nie pabaču ich — nie paškaduju.
Ej! Dyk heta ty, {STR_SALUTATION}? {?SPEAKER.GENDER}Rada{?}Rady{\?} ciabie bačyć.

{?PLAYER.GENDER}Sama{?}Sam{\?} viedaješ, da čaho davodzić kachańnie. Dačka była na poźnim terminie, i ludzi ŭžo hatovy byli jazyki raspuskać. Ja ŭziaŭ sabie mieč i kania — jak płatu za doŭhuju słužbu — i daŭ drała. Moža, praz dvaccać hadoŭ viarnusia i skažu novamu jarłu: «Vitaju, syn!»

My father insisted that we would still hunt. It was madness, just three people in a boat, but what else could we do? One day a whale that he harpooned dragged us far out to sea. When we were struggling to row back, a storm blew up, and sank the boat. My father and I swam ashore but my uncle drowned. Id had enough. I left the next day.

Despite my sufferings I still yearn for travel and traffic. And none of these wrecks was any fault of my own. Misfortune is a good teacher, they say, and I think my knowledge is second to none in terms of what not to do when in command of a ship.
I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. One table in the High Hall is reserved for our fallen, and two more for those we have slain.
Great are your sorrows, but greater still your perseverance! Surely it shall be rewarded with riches.

Turns out my neighbor, Odig, was a difficult one. People say he had troll-blood. One day he shows up with his retainers and tells me my sheep had broken into his fields, when they hadnt, and demanded compensation. I told him to go away. Then I started to find my sheep dead in their pastures, and then one of my herdsman. I decided to take my case before the Thing.
You, over there! Peace to you! Who captains your ship?
Well... Unless I reckon the odds falsely, Id say you have a good chance of getting wet shortly. I hope you can swim.
I trust you have been keeping well, enjoying the salt air and sending the miscreants of the sea to their watery graves.
Ahoy! You want something with us? You might find youve caught more than you bargained for.

I am from Charas. The islands of the coast are rich in mackeral and tuna but treacherous, with many small currents and unpredictable winds. We reckon ourselves the finest sailors in Calradia, if you dont mind my saying.
{STR_SALUTATION}... I shall stain the seas with your blood.
Nothing makes a finer warrior than a hunger to prove yourself that can never be satisfied.

So heres where I come in... Lets say you have acquired a cheap Aserai shabak, by one means or the other. It was intended as a ship that could move goods from one place to another as cheaply as possible. But you want it refitted to be faster, with a lead-sheeted belly and some towers for archers, never mind why. My family and I specialized in adding them.
A cruel fate to suffer, just for bring food to your fellow-men.
Ahoy! Damn your eyes and stay out of our way, you clumsy lubbers. Who captains you?

Im from Zeonica. In my youth, the archon was one Sulvanis, father of the current Garios. Now, let us say your empire is at peace with the Aserai and Vlandians, but their merchants are cutting into your pockets and you expect to be at war in the future. If one of your mariners sailed out of harbor with one ship and came back with two, would you question them too carefully?

The Thinglaw, though... To gain a hearing I needed a chieftain to back my case. I found one, but he brought a great retinue along with him, which I had to feast. The Thing ruled in my favor and outlawed Odig - everyone hated him - but to enforce the judgment , to take his head and his property, well, I was on my own there. My chief offered to provide armed men, but not for free.
Heave to and prepare to be boarded, or fight.[ib:warrior][if:convo_angry]
So... I can cast a harpoon, and handle a boat that is being dragged by a whale in its death throes. I think I would be of use in any ships crew, if the pay is right.
Ahoy! May I speak to your captain?
{?RULER.GENDER}Jarlinna{?}Jarl{\?} {RULER.NAME}
{STR_SALUTATION}... Peace to you... I hope the sea air is doing you good.
I hear you seized one of my trading vessels. I am not pleased.
I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the {CLAN_NAME}.
Pirates, and those that help them, are the common enemy of mankind.
{STR_SALUTATION}... I hope the seas have been treating you well.
I heard you fought ship to ship with {DEFEATED_PARTY_LEADER}, and won.
I do not know your ship. Who commands you?
Sounds like a fine source of income for the old clans of Beinland.
{STR_SALUTATION}... Ahoy! So somehow youve managed to keep yourself afloat since we last met. Its good to see you, you worthless lubber!
{STR_SALUTATION}... Pirates like you may put on airs, but they all end up the same way, dangling from the yardarm of their betters.
Ahoy, there! If you could be so kind, could you try to steer your lump of flotsam out of our way?
a jarl

We moved to the Jumne because we heard there was farmland for the taking. When we arrived, we found there were Vanni already there, but at first they did not mind our presence. They lived in the woods and left us the open meadows by the river. I was given in marriage to the Vanni chieftains son to seal the arrangement, along with some cloth and axe-heads.
Ahoy! Keep your distance, lest you foul our sails. Who is in command over there?
karol Nordviha
Ahoy! We know youre an enemy, so do not think to take us unawares.
Well take it. Now best get your sails over the horizon before we change your minds.[ib:closed][rf:convo_bared_teeth]
I will say this. Many lords condemn us, but relatively few are willing to pass up the opportunity to employ us, at least not when they have ships to maintain.
Yes, certainly family can be demanding...
I shall mark down your name. Now, do not take it amiss if I do not invite you to dine on board, for the world is a treacherous place, and I have learned to be wary.

I come from Svalfjord. Farther north than that, people cannot live. There is ice in our bay for six months of the year. In the summer we hunt whales, black whales, which are smaller than most but are cunning and can still sink you if youre not careful. Each summer we gather in our boats and drive the whales into the fjord. Since I was a girl I would go with my father and uncle and several others from the village.
Ahoy! Whose ship is this?

Alas, our captain was a braggart. We were headed to Revyl with a cargo of dates and dyes. He wished to show his knowledge of the Bay of Ortygia, and took a quick route between the islands. Of course he was dashed on the rocks. I seized a timber, and was washed shore with a dozen other half-drowned survivors who had what I guess you could call luck.
I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}. We are wound-smiths and wave-riders, raven-feeders and ring-breakers.
the Nords
Greetings! Do I speak to the captain of this ship, my lady?

I am a skilled mariner. I am from Kujaz. The blood of the Kannic people runs in my veins, and Kannic blood is half saltwater, so they say. I took to the sea at an early age as a navigators apprentice, and by 20 I had accumulated enough to buy a share in a ship sailing the Jade Sea.
Just get yourself a lord and master. Much simpler than setting your own course though this world.
Who are you? Strike your sails and ship your oars, or prepare to fight.
{STR_SALUTATION}... Is that you on that ship? Its been a while.
Ahoy! Whats your name? Forgive me if we have spoken before and I do not recall, for I have met many promising captains only to hear later they were swallowed by the deep.
I dont know you... If you have anything to say, say it quickly. The sharks are hungry and I would not keep them waiting.
I can only hope that Heaven has prepared a reward for all the sorrow and suffering that I am about to relate to you.

Im from the Nordvyg, but moved to Beinland. I bought a herd of sheep there, which I hoped would make my fortune, but between several bad winters and some disputes with my neighbors, well, that all came to naught. Im much poorer than I was before, but at least Im a bit wiser for having studied at the foot of such a harsh teacher as that island. If youre looking for someone to lead your company through the wilds, well, I may be him.

My father was one of the Sea-Victuallers. Perhaps you have heard of them. When the guildmaster of Charas brought in the Brotherhood of the Woods and rebelled against the Vlandian king, the fishermen of the coast brought supplies to the besieged city. They did it for pay, mind, as starving cities will pay dearly for moldy bread and minnows, not because they believed a word of the Brotherhoods mad promises of a world without lords and ladies and taxes and tithes.
Right. So unless you ship your oars now and let us board you, youre going down.[ib:warrior][if:convo_angry]
I suppose you owed nothing to a master who took you for granted.
{STR_SALUTATION}... We sail at your command.
Good, good. I much prefer a straight-up deal to rummaging through your gut afterward to see what you might have hid there.[ib:hip][rf:convo_bemused]

I grew up in Zeonica. Corsairing is an honorable profession there. It hones the skills of the empires sailors, between wars. I specialize in the construction and modification of corsair vessels, and may even have sailed on one from time to time.
I do not know your ship. Who are you? What do you want with us?
Name the sum, and be quick about it, or well just feed you to the sharks.[ib:hip][rf:convo_bared_teeth]
{STR_SALUTATION}... Is that you? Please be brief. The winds are with us and I have no time to waste.
{STR_SALUTATION}... Our ship is at your command.
I remember when we last met and battled, ship to ship.
You, over there! Tell me the name of the captain brave enough to put to sea in such a leaky jumble of planks as your ship.

But a smiths life has its advantages. The ladies of the castle, you see, sometimes needed their jewelry repaired. I was down there hammering away in the sweat and the smoke, and I suppose I was one of the few interesting things to see in that freezing fortress if youre a jarls daughter with a great deal of time on her hands.
Yeah, okay, maybe also consider that your destiny wants you to remain on dry land.
So... What am I doing in this dingy tavern, far from my homeland? Well, I suppose its because I was taught that its a fine thing to be ambitious, to seize what chances fate gives you...
You cant outrun us. Yield or die.[ib:warrior][if:convo_aggressive]
Well, Ill not deny it. Itll be a real pleasure to feed you to the sharks.
Ahoy! Keep a bowshots length away, or more, until I know if youre friend or foe.
I wonder how many men you have slain to forget a childs taunt.

I was the youngest son in my family. Well, in our lands, sons - especially the youngest - are expected to make their own name. I can fight by land or by sea, and I am ready to serve whoever rewards me well.
Ahoy! Do you care to tell me your name, before I give the order to engage your ship?
Let me think how I want to put this...
Ahoy there, now! Before we fight, if you will, tell me who captains your ship!
Very well. Sail safely, and dont forget to put aside some silver for your return trip.[ib:closed][rf:convo_bemused]

But suppose again that you are the archon Garios, scheming to become emperor. You need a treaty with the sultan, sooner not later. And the sultan has his court full of aggrieved merchants. So you announce a list of men to be exiled, names that are known throughout the Perassic Sea as men of ingenuity and daring.
I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}, one of the ancient lineages of the Nords.
So, I dont mind sharpening blades and fixing armor, but the one thing I ask is the chance to better myself. Now that Ive laid that out straight, what do you say? Do you have work for a man like me?
Ahoy! Respect the custom of the sea and the terms of parley, and I shall do likewise. Now, who are you?
I will not forget how our ships met those of {DEFEATED_PARTY_LEADER}, and bested them.
Ahoy! I know you, dont I? {STR_SALUTATION}... Do you and I have anything to talk about?

I was the youngest in my family. My mother always told me that some day I would own the finest galley in the northlands. My oldest brother heard this, and would mock me incessantly. When I would set forth on my fine ship? Would my mother sail with me to fight my enemies? Perhaps he wished me to shame me into leaving, so I would give him no trouble about our inheritance.
Expect no mercy.[ib:aggressive][if:convo_very_stern]
{STR_SALUTATION}... My ship and crew are yours to command.
